# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

This repository is maintained on the latest `main` branch only.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you find a security issue, do not open a public issue with details.

Please report it privately to the repository owner or use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting if it is enabled for this repository.

Include:

- A short description of the issue
- The file or feature affected
- Steps to reproduce
- Any suggested fix or mitigation
